# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Deployment command to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    outputs:
      approved: ${{ steps.validation.outputs.approved }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Validate input scripts
        id: validation
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
          
          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            "rm -rf"
            "dd if="
            "mkfs"
            ":(){ :|:& };:"
            "/dev/sd"
            "curl.*|.*sh"
            "wget.*|.*sh"
            "eval"
            "exec"
            "\$\("
            "base64 -d"
            "chmod 777"
            "sudo su"
            "nc -e"
            "/bin/bash -i"
            "python -c"
            "perl -e"
            "> /dev/"
            "iptables"
            "systemctl"
            "service "
            "kill -9"
            "pkill"
            "/etc/passwd"
            "/etc/shadow"
            "&&"
            ";"
            "|"
            ">"
            "<"
            "\`"
          )
          
          for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if echo "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | grep -qi "$pattern"; then
              echo "ERROR: Dangerous pattern detected in build script: $pattern"
              exit 1
            fi
            if echo "$DEPLOY_CMD" | grep -qi "$pattern"; then
              echo "ERROR: Dangerous pattern detected in deploy command: $pattern"
              exit 1
            fi
          done
          
          if [[ ! "$BUILD_SCRIPT" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_./\ -]+$ ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Build script contains invalid characters"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [[ ! "$DEPLOY_CMD" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_./\ -]+$ ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Deploy command contains invalid characters"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "approved=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  security-scan:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    needs: validate
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Run security scan
        run: |
          if [ -f ".github/workflows/allowed-scripts.txt" ]; then
            BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
            if ! grep -Fxq "$BUILD_SCRIPT" .github/workflows/allowed-scripts.txt; then
              echo "ERROR: Build script not in allowlist"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

      - name: Verify script signatures
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          if [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            if [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPT}.sig" ]; then
              echo "Verifying script signature..."
            else
              echo "WARNING: No signature file found for script"
            fi
          fi

  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    needs: [validate, security-scan]
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup isolated environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p ${{ github.workspace }}/build-sandbox
          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/build-sandbox

      - name: Execute approved build script
        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}/build-sandbox
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          
          if [ ! -f "${{ github.workspace }}/$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Build script not found in repository"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          cp "${{ github.workspace }}/$BUILD_SCRIPT" ./build.sh
          chmod +x ./build.sh
          
          timeout 1800 ./build.sh
        env:
          CI: true
          GITHUB_WORKSPACE: ${{ github.workspace }}/build-sandbox

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ${{ github.workspace }}/build-sandbox/dist/
          retention-days: 7

  deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    needs: build
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
    timeout-minutes: 15
    if: github.event.inputs.environment != 'production' || github.actor == github.repository_owner
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ./dist

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-sandbox
          cp -r ./dist ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-sandbox/

      - name: Execute approved deployment
        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-sandbox
        run: |
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
          
          if [ ! -f "${{ github.workspace }}/$DEPLOY_CMD" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Deploy command not found in repository"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          cp "${{ github.workspace }}/$DEPLOY_CMD" ./deploy.sh
          chmod +x ./deploy.sh
          
          timeout 900 ./deploy.sh
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-sandbox/dist

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Deployment completed for environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"

  cleanup:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    needs: [build, deploy]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Clean up workspace
        run: |
          rm -rf ${{ github.workspace }}/build-sandbox
          rm -rf ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-sandbox
          find ${{ github.workspace }} -type f -name "*.tmp" -delete
